pattern: Reducing a number to its multiset of digits lets the best pairwise product fall out from just the two largest digits.
hints: You only ever care about the digits of the number, not the number itself.
A product is maximized by the two biggest factors, and digits are non-negative, so smaller digits never help.
Take the two largest digits (the same digit may repeat) and multiply them.

edge_inputs.description: three distinct digits, largest two win
leading large digit but a zero present

stress.description: random values across the full range
